languages.text: "В таком случае, не станем откладывать. Пожалуйста, пригласите досточтимого коллегу — я, как видите, лишен возможности это сделать".
"Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague over — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."
languages.original_text: "В таком случае, не станем откладывать. Пожалуйста, пригласите досточтимого коллегу — я, как видите, лишен возможности это сделать".

traits.locale_text: "Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague; I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."
"Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague; I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."
"Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague in — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."
"Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague in — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."
"Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague over — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."
"Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague over — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."

languages.text: "Dann lasst uns keine Zeit verlieren. Tut mir den Gefallen und ladet meinen geschätzten Kollegen ein ... ich bin ja offensichtlich nicht in der Position, es selbst zu tun."
languages.original_text: "Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague over — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."

traits.locale_text: "Dann lasst uns keine Zeit verlieren. Tut mir den Gefallen und ladet meinen geschätzten Kollegen ein ... ich bin ja offensichtlich nicht in der Position, es selbst zu tun."

languages.text: « Dans ce cas, il n'y a pas de temps à perdre. Rendez-moi service et invitez mon estimé collègue à nous rejoindre. Comme vous le constatez, je ne suis pas en état de le faire moi-même. »
languages.original_text: "Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague over — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."

traits.locale_text: « Dans ce cas, il n'y a pas de temps à perdre. Rendez-moi service et invitez mon estimé collègue à nous rejoindre. Comme vous le constatez, je ne suis pas en état de le faire moi-même. »

languages.text: «Pues no esperemos más. Haga el favor de invitar a mi estimado colega. Como podrá comprender, no estoy en posición de hacerlo yo».
languages.original_text: "Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague over — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."

traits.locale_text: «Pues no esperemos más. Haga el favor de invitar a mi estimado colega. Como podrá comprender, no estoy en posición de hacerlo yo».

languages.text: "O zaman gecikmeyelim. Saygıdeğer meslektaşımı buyur eder misiniz? Açıkça görüldüğü üzere bunu yapabilecek durumda değilim."
languages.original_text: "Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague in — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."

traits.locale_text: "O zaman gecikmeyelim. Saygıdeğer meslektaşımı buyur eder misiniz? Açıkça görüldüğü üzere bunu yapabilecek durumda değilim."

languages.text: “那就别再拖延了。劳烦您把我那位尊敬的同僚请进来吧。您也看到了，我眼下无力自己前去。”
languages.original_text: "Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague over — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."

traits.locale_text: “那就别再拖延了。劳烦您把我那位尊敬的同僚请进来吧。您也看到了，我眼下无力自己前去。”

languages.text: 「では、ぐずぐずしている暇はありません。どうか、我が尊敬すべき同僚をこちらへお招きください――ご覧の通り、私自身ではそれもままならぬ身ですので」
languages.original_text: "Then let us not delay. Do me the favour of inviting my esteemed colleague over — I am, as is evident, in no position to do so myself."

traits.locale_text: 「では、ぐずぐずしている暇はありません。どうか、我が尊敬すべき同僚をこちらへお招きください――ご覧の通り、私自身ではそれもままならぬ身ですので」
